outcome_summary: Third routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 03 — 28 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_03.md. Findings: C1 1 Reversed/28 = 3.6% (E-14 perdurantism->temporal_parts, a theory placed before its own defining constituent; not audit-touched — identical rate to shard 02, below shard 01's 10.7% and the production audit's 13% baseline); C2 0/20 fail; C3 0/20 fail (uniformly high node quality across 20 INTERPRETED/active nodes). One edge scored Defensible (E-15 kantian_aesthetic_judgment->aesthetic_disinterest, a genuine both-ways call). Six audit-touched edges (E-7, E-9, E-12, E-21, E-26, E-27 — all carrying 'Per S-0122 audit' evidence from migrations 0062/0063/0064) all verified Sound; this shard re-confirmed every S-0122 decision it sampled, zero re-openings. Candidate findings only — disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-03 marked complete; SQA-04 next. Filed Issue #126 (tech-debt/documentation): the routine eager-claim step in routine-mode-operations.md step 8 + routine-mode-lifecycle SKILL step 8 omits the required current.json task_id/target_id fields — routine_lifecycle_push.py deliverable-mode refused the push (exit 2, 'not a routine session') until the fields were added; worked around by folding the current.json correction into the unpushed deliverable commit via --amend. Same doc-drift class as #122/#123/#124. health_check_overdue soft-warn fires (S-0162 is 21 slots since S-0141 audit, cadence 20, overdue by 1) — routine sessions do not run audits; deferred to the next interactive session per routine-mode posture. mempalace_zero_citations_after_search fires because the boot search returned 0 drawers above the 0.6 threshold (substrate up; nothing relevant to cite). 0 validator hard-fails (48 checks). Prior context: boot search 0 drawers; diary read surfaced S-0158/S-0159/S-0160.
